testcase.name: approveRequest_NotFound
testcase.system-out: 17:58:13.211 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Admin 'admin1' approving request ID: 99

testcase.name: approveRequest_Success
testcase.system-out: 17:58:13.254 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Admin 'admin1' approving request ID: 1 17:58:13.254 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Deducting 5 units of item 'Blue Pen' (ID: 1) from inventory 17:58:13.255 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Request ID: 1 approved by admin 'admin1'. All inventory deductions successful. 17:58:13.256 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- Attempting to fetch email for student 'student1' via auth-service 17:58:13.256 [main] WARN com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- Fetched email for user 'student1' is blank, skipping notification.

testcase.name: rejectRequest_Success
testcase.system-out: 17:58:13.271 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Admin 'admin1' rejecting request ID: 1 with reason: 'Out of budget' 17:58:13.272 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Request ID: 1 rejected by admin 'admin1'. 17:58:13.272 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- Attempting to fetch email for student 'student1' via auth-service 17:58:13.273 [main] WARN com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- Fetched email for user 'student1' is blank, skipping notification.

testcase.name: createRequest_Success
testcase.system-out: 17:58:13.276 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Creating new stationery request for student: student1 17:58:13.276 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- AUDIT: Stationery request created successfully. RequestId: generated-uuid, Student: student1, Items: 1 17:58:13.277 [main] INFO com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- Attempting to fetch email for student 'student1' via auth-service 17:58:13.277 [main] WARN com.stationery.request.service.RequestService -- Fetched email for user 'student1' is blank, skipping notification.
